# idsec_sia_settings_rdp_file_signing (Data Source)

The SIA RDP File Signing settings data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "idsec_sia_settings_rdp_file_signing" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Choose to enable or disable RDP file signing feature.
- `pfx_secret_id` (String) Secret ID of the uploaded PFX certificate stored in ADB secrets service.
